notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones singles on a ground ball to left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Kevin McGonigle GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kevin McGonigle grounds into a double play, first baseman Miguel Vargas to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Zach McKinstry out at 2nd. Kevin McGonigle out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, first baseman Miguel Vargas to shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Dillon Dingler out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Vargas reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Vargas reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Edgar Quero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edgar Quero grounds into a double play, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to shortstop Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Colson Montgomery out at 2nd. Edgar Quero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Braden Montgomery pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Braden Montgomery grounds out, second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson.

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi pinch-hit
